description: rank_search_matches re-ranks the single staged 1880-census candidate (recovered by searching the formal BirthName 'Mary', not the nickname 'Bitsie') against tree subject I1 (Mary/Bitsie Jackson, b.~1850 Lancaster County, Pennsylvania). The Mary Jackson record in William Jackson's household (ark MJKN-BIT) scores as a strong match and — because subject I1 carries no sources yet — comes back unattached, i.e. new evidence to extract. Matched on subjectId (wildcard '~'); independent of the per-run stagedResultsRef handle. Used by the non-derivative-nickname search-records test to exercise the match-ranked review surface + checkAttachments flag without a live match API.
